sipantichijk@penguin:~/church_project/SoC$ cd ~/church_project/SoC

# Look for cpu0.yaml generated by Efinity synthesis:
find ~/church_project/SoC -name '*.yaml' 2>/dev/null
find ~/efinity -name 'cpu0.yaml' 2>/dev/null | head -5

# If not found, create minimal cpu0.yaml for this VexRiscv config:
cat > ~/church_project/SoC/cpu0.yaml << 'EOF'
hardwareBreakpointCount : 0
instructionCacheCount : 2
dataCacheCount : 0
EOF

# Check ftdi_ti.cfg (may differ for Titanium Ti60 vs Trion T120):
cat ~/efinity/2025.2/ipm/ip/efx_tsemac/fpga/Ti60F225_devkit/embedded_sw/sapphire/bsp/efinix/EfxSapphireSoc/openocd/ftdi_ti.cfg

# Retry OpenOCD with the yaml in place:
workspace_loc=~/church_project/SoC \
~/efinity/efinity-riscv-ide-2025.2/openocd/bin/openocd \
  -f ~/efinity/2025.2/ipm/ip/efx_tsemac/fpga/Ti60F225_devkit/embedded_sw/sapphire/bsp/efinix/EfxSapphireSoc/openocd/ftdi_ti.cfg \
  -f ~/efinity/2025.2/ipm/ip/efx_tsemac/fpga/Ti60F225_devkit/embedded_sw/sapphire/bsp/efinix/EfxSapphireSoc/openocd/debug.cfg \
  -c "targets fpga_spinal.cpu0; halt; load_image firmware/firmware.bin 0xF9000000 bin; resume 0xF9000000; sleep 3000; shutdown" &

sleep 2 && python3 -c "
import serial
s = serial.Serial('/dev/ttyUSB3', 115200, timeout=10)
print('Listening...')
data = s.read(500)
print(repr(data))
s.close()
"
/home/sipantichijk/efinity/2025.2/ipm/ip/efx_tsemac/fpga/T120F324_devkit/embedded_sw/sapphire/cpu0.yaml
/home/sipantichijk/efinity/2025.2/ipm/ip/efx_tsemac/fpga/Ti60F225_devkit/embedded_sw/sapphire/cpu0.yaml
/home/sipantichijk/efinity/2025.2/ipm/ip/efx_sd_host_controller/fpga/T120F576_devkit/embedded_sw/sd_soc/cpu0.yaml
/home/sipantichijk/efinity/2025.2/ipm/ip/efx_dma/fpga/T120F576_devkit/embedded_sw/soc_inst0/cpu0.yaml
/home/sipantichijk/efinity/2025.2/ipm/ip/efx_soc/efx_soc/embedded_sw/cpu0.yaml
interface ftdi
ftdi_device_desc "Titanium Ti60F225 Development Kit"
#ftdi_vid_pid 0x0403 0x6010
ftdi_vid_pid 0x0403 0x6011

# Channel for using JTAG. 0 => channel A, 1 => channel B
ftdi_channel 1

#  name   signal  state      direction  JTAG name
# *DBUS0  TCK/SK  (low =0)   (out=1)    
# *DBUS1  TDI/DO  (low =0)   (out=1)    
# *DBUS2  TDO/DI  (low =0)   (in =0)    
# *DBUS3  TMS/CS  (high=1)   (out=1)    
# *DBUS4  GPIOL0  (low =0)   (out=0)    (nTRST)
# *DBUS5  GPIOL1  (low =0)   (out=0)    WAIT | STOPCLK
# *DBUS6  GPIOL2  (low =0)   (out=0)    (nRST)
# *DBUS7  GPIOL3  (low =0)   (out=0)    RTCK
ftdi_layout_init 0x08 0x0b


[1] 10402
Open On-Chip Debugger 0.11.0+dev-04058-ge6c19f2ee-dirty (2025-10-15-15:28)
Licensed under GNU GPL v2
For bug reports, read
        http://openocd.org/doc/doxygen/bugs.html
DEPRECATED! use 'adapter driver' not 'interface'
DEPRECATED! use 'ftdi device_desc' not 'ftdi_device_desc'
DEPRECATED! use 'ftdi vid_pid' not 'ftdi_vid_pid'
DEPRECATED! use 'ftdi channel' not 'ftdi_channel'
DEPRECATED! use 'ftdi layout_init' not 'ftdi_layout_init'
DEPRECATED! use 'adapter speed' not 'adapter_khz'
DEPRECATED! use 'adapter srst delay' not 'adapter_nsrst_delay'

Info : set servers polling period to 50ms
Info : clock speed 800 kHz

Warn : JTAG tap: fpga_spinal.bridge       UNEXPECTED: 0x10660a79 (mfg: 0x53c (Efinix Inc), part: 0x0660, ver: 0x1)
Error: JTAG tap: fpga_spinal.bridge  expected 1 of 1: 0x00220a79 (mfg: 0x53c (Efinix Inc), part: 0x0220, ver: 0x0)

Error: Can't communicate with the CPU

sipantichijk@penguin:~/church_project/SoC$
